name: tin-window-manager
title: TiN Window Manager
description: Snap, unsnap, and manage windows with TiN
author: lutelute

commands.name: snap-window
commands.title: Snap Frontmost Window
commands.description: Snap the current frontmost window into TiN

commands.name: unsnap-window
commands.title: Unsnap Frontmost Window
commands.description: Release the current frontmost window from TiN

commands.name: show-status
commands.title: TiN Status
commands.description: Show snapped windows and workspace state
